options: The legal process by which a non-citizen becomes a U.S. citizen
questions.explanation: It is how eligible permanent residents become citizens.

questions.q: Which form is the Application for Naturalization?
questions.explanation: Form N-400 is filed with USCIS to apply for citizenship.

questions.q: At what moment does a person officially become a citizen?
options: When taking the Oath of Allegiance
questions.explanation: Citizenship becomes official at the oath ceremony.

questions.q: Which is a right gained with citizenship?
options: The right to vote in federal elections
questions.explanation: Citizens can vote, hold a passport, and run for most offices.

questions.q: Which is a responsibility of citizens?
options: Serving on a jury when called
questions.explanation: Jury service, obeying the law, and paying taxes are responsibilities.
